tier1 / tier2 / tier3 アプリ
(metrics / logs / traces / profiles 発生源)

div.div:
OTel Agent (DaemonSet, Apache 2.0)
namespace=observability
Pod 受信 → Gateway 中継のみ

OTel Gateway (Deployment, Apache 2.0)
PII mask / tail sampling / batch / routing
バックエンド分岐の単一接続点

div.div: AGPL 分離ゾーン: 別 namespace / 別プロセス / 別 NetworkPolicy

div.div:
Loki (AGPL v3) — Logs
namespace=observability-lgtm
StatefulSet (3 replicas) + S3 互換 (MinIO/Wasabi)
保持: 30 日 hot / 365 日 cold

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 230px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Mimir (AGPL v3) — Metrics (Prometheus 互換)
namespace=observability-lgtm
StatefulSet (3 replicas) + S3 互換
保持: 30 日 hot / 13 ヶ月 long-term

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 330px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tempo (AGPL v3) — Traces (OTLP)
namespace=observability-lgtm
StatefulSet (2 replicas) + S3 互換
保持: 14 日 (tail sampling 後)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Grafana (AGPL v3) — UI / Dashboard / Alert
namespace=observability-lgtm
Deployment (2 replicas) + Postgres for state
Keycloak OIDC SSO 必須 (匿名閲覧禁止)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 510px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Object Store (S3 互換: MinIO リリース時点 / クラウド S3 採用初期)
リリース時点 では infra/data/minio に同一クラスタ配置 / 採用初期で外部退避

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div: 凡例 / 設計判断

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 621px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Apache 2.0 ゾーン: アプリと OTel Collector の同居許容 (プロセス共有 OK)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 644px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: AGPL v3 ゾーン: 別 namespace / 別 NetworkPolicy / プロセス境界共有禁止

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 667px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: インフラ層: S3 互換オブジェクトストレージ (リリース時点 MinIO / 採用初期 で外部 S3 移行)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 621px; margin-left: 611px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 621px; margin-left: 632px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 実線太: テレメトリ送信経路 (アプリ → Agent → Gateway)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 644px; margin-left: 611px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 644px; margin-left: 632px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 点線: Grafana の datasource 接続 (UI 起点の read 経路)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 696px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ① AGPL 分離は ADR-0003 を物理化したもの。Loki / Mimir / Tempo / Grafana は別プロセス・別 namespace・別 ServiceAccount で動かし、tier1 バイナリと dynamic linking しない。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 716px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ② OTel Gateway が単一接続点。Grafana から各 backend を直接見る設計を選ばず、Collector を経由させない理由は「データソース読込に Collector を介在させると read レイテンシが悪化」するため (read は datasource 直接 / write は Collector 集約)。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 736px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ③ オブジェクトストレージは リリース時点 で同一クラスタ MinIO に配置、採用初期 で AWS S3 / GCS / Azure Blob などへ移行。S3 互換 API を採用することで、移行は datasource URL 変更と secret rotate のみで完了させる。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 756px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ④ 保持期間 (Loki 30 日 / Mimir 13 ヶ月 / Tempo 14 日) は Google SRE Book と CNCF Observability WG の典型例に揃え、コスト試算は 99 章索引 + 70 章リリースと結合する。
